Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: begin select @emp= employee_id from Employees where employee_id=@empID END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE procedure test1 (@empID int, @emp int output) as

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value:
begin begin try select * from Employees where employee_id=@empID select 1/0 END try
begin catch raiserror('test msgggggsssssssss trrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr',16,1) end catch
END
